title: HD Hyundai Samho snags $179 million oil tanker order in Greece
section_path: HD Hyundai Samho snags $179 million oil tanker order in Greece
section_path_text: HD Hyundai Samho snags $179 million oil tanker order in Greece
summary:
Main
HD Hyundai Samho said Friday it has secured a 263.2 billion won ($179 milion) order to build two oil tankers for a shipping company in Greece. The deal covers two 157,000-deadweight-ton tankers, with deliveries scheduled by May 2029, the company said in a regulatory filing. The name of the Greece-based client was not disclosed.
